title: helichrysum leucocladum
intro: Helichrysum leucocladum, also known as elephant's tooth or mountain helichrysum, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful for wound healing, pain relief, and reducing swelling. The plant's health benefits include reducing oxidative stress, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum leucocladum can be found in essential oil form, which is often used in aromatherapy and applied topically to benefit from its medicinal properties.
